hooks.command: if command -v agentmonitors >/dev/null 2>&1; then agentmonitors session start || true; else printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"The agentmonitors plugin is installed, but its CLI is not on your PATH. Install it with: npm i -g @agentmonitors/cli"}}'; fi
command -v agentmonitors >/dev/null 2>&1 && agentmonitors hook deliver || true
command -v agentmonitors >/dev/null 2>&1 && agentmonitors session end || true
